context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the background-job instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Job Purpose** — Define trigger conditions, input parameters, expected output/side effects, and criticality.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Error Classification** — Classify all anticipated errors:

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Queue & Timeout** — Assign queue priority and set execution timeout.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Write failing tests covering: successful execution, idempotency (run twice = same result), transient error raises, permanent error discards.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run full test suite: `mix test` — confirm no regressions.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify telemetry events fire on success and failure paths.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never deploy until all four phase gates above are green.**

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: When completing a background job implementation, output MUST follow this structure:
